    def test_interrupt_with_sigint(self, executable_path):
        """Test interrupting with SIGINT shows statistics."""
        import subprocess
        import signal
        import time
    
        # Start pingu with high count so it runs for a while
        proc = subprocess.Popen(
            [str(executable_path), "-c", "100", "127.0.0.1"],
            stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
            stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
            text=True,
        )
    
        # Let it run for a bit
        time.sleep(1)
    
        # Send SIGINT
        proc.send_signal(signal.SIGINT)
    
        # Wait for it to finish
